title: cratoxylum sumatranum subsp. neriifolium
intro: Cratoxylum sumatranum subsp. neriifolium is a subspecies of Cratoxylum sumatranum, a plant species native to Indonesia, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. It is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The leaves of this plant are often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and improving respiratory health. Additionally, the plant's extracts are used in modern herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties for various health conditions.
